category_sources: source_facts.description says hashcat is a password recovery utility; official repository describes it as advanced password recovery software.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides hashcat; official website and repository use lowercase hashcat.
docs_sources: Official hashcat repository directs usage/help to the Hashcat Wiki at hashcat.net.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official hashcat wiki and repository identify https://github.com/hashcat/hashcat as the source code repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official repository describe password recovery, optimized hashing algorithms, CPUs/GPUs, and hardware acceleration.
